posts.text: SUMMARY: @dantawfik's (antiaging vendor) showed paper, ~½ of aging can be stopped with "exercise", while other ½ was deemed unstoppable, hence requiring some pills. But the "exercise" was barely exercise, hence necessarily underestimates training in quantity & modality.
posts.author: nntaleb
